categories.name: A SESSION WITH DR. JOYCE BROTHERS

questions.clue:
[IMAGE CLUE]
(Dr. Joyce Brothers delivers the clue.) So he wants a divorce. Suggest a "trial" one of these -- maybe you'll find life better without the bum

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Dr. Joyce Brothers delivers the clue.) You make your boyfriend feel inadequate because no man ever loses his awe of this woman

[IMAGE CLUE]
